channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NGOs Urge Nigerian Media to Boost Climate Awareness Reporting
item.description: For Abuja, some environment NGOs don yan say make media organisations begin dey invest for climate literacy. Di idea be say make journalists no just dey report weather anyhow but dey give people prope...

item.title: Dorothy Malone’s Early Career and Iconic 1940s Film Moments
item.description: Dorothy Malone, born January 29, 1924, began her Hollywood career in the 1940s as a brunette often cast in wholesome or supporting roles. Discovered at age 19 while performing in a college play at Sou...

item.title: Trump undecided about attending Donald Trump Jr's wedding in the Bahamas due to international pressures
item.description: US President Donald Trump has indicated he is unsure whether he will attend his son Donald Trump Jr's upcoming wedding in the Bahamas, describing the timing as inconvenient amid ongoing international ...

item.title: Kenya Conducts Nationwide Rice Survey to Improve Local Production and Food Security
item.description: Kenya has kicked off a nationwide survey on rice production, spearheaded by the State Department for Irrigation. The National Baseline Survey for Rice Production aims to collect detailed information f...

item.title: NTA Director General informs Parliamentary Panel that NEET-UG 2026 question paper was not leaked via official system, CBI probe underway
item.description: In a meeting of the Parliamentary Standing Committee on Education, Women, Children, Youth and Sports, top officials of the National Testing Agency (NTA) faced tough questions from several Members of P...

item.title: Sialkot on High Alert Following Water Release from Indian Dam on Chenab River
item.description: Authorities in Sialkot and neighbouring areas are on high alert after India opened the spillway gates of its Salal Dam on the Chenab River, which is expected to raise the river's water level by more t...

item.title: TikTok influencer arrested over alleged murder-for-hire plot involving ex-partner
item.description: Gabbie Gonzalez, a 24-year-old TikTok influencer known for content on travel, lifestyle and motherhood, has been arrested in Northern California for allegedly attempting to hire a hitman via the dark ...

item.title: Lagos Lawmaker Thanks Supporters and Urges Unity After APC Primary
item.description: Stephen Ogundipe, wey dey represent Oshodi-Isolo Constituency I for Lagos State House of Assembly, don thank members of the All Progressives Congress (APC) and him supporters for di strong support dur...

item.title: Teacher denies allegations of harming adopted baby during trial
item.description: Jamie Varley, a 37-year-old teacher, appeared at Preston Crown Court to deny accusations of sexually abusing and murdering 13-month-old Preston Davey, the infant he and his partner John McGowan-Fazake...

item.title: Bafana Bafana preliminary World Cup squad announced with Rayners and Poggenpoel included
item.description: Bafana Bafana coach Hugo Broos has unveiled his preliminary squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, including notable selections that have sparked discussions among fans and pundits alike. Among the inclus...

item.title: Cuyo, Palawan Records Extreme Heat Index of 51°C, PAGASA Issues Safety Advisory
item.description: The town of Cuyo in Palawan experienced an extreme heat index of 51 degrees Celsius, the highest recorded this year, according to the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Admi...

item.title: Audit Finds Millions Misused by Maricopa County Sheriff’s Office in Racial Profiling Settlement
item.description: A decade-long audit of the Maricopa County Sheriff’s Office (MCSO) has revealed that millions of dollars intended for a class-action settlement addressing racial profiling were misused or misattribute...

item.title: Suspect arrested for alleged fraud in Ceta mobile phone procurement
item.description: Police in South Africa have arrested a suspect linked to an alleged procurement fraud scheme at the Construction Education and Training Authority (Ceta) involving mobile phones. According to Ceta, the...

item.title: Museveni acknowledges Tanzania’s role in Uganda’s liberation and honors Mwalimu Nyerere
item.description: During his inauguration in Kampala on 12th May 2026, Ugandan President Yoweri Museveni publicly recognized the crucial support Tanzania provided during Uganda’s liberation struggle. He paid special tr...

item.title: Governor Uba Sani Wins APC Ticket for 2027 Kaduna Governorship Election with Massive Affirmation Votes
item.description: Kaduna State Governor, Uba Sani, has successfully emerged as the All Progressives Congress (APC) candidate for the 2027 governorship election. The governor, who was the only aspirant, pulled a total o...

item.title: Historical Reasons Behind the Placement of Buttons and Zippers on Men’s and Women’s Clothing
item.description: The placement of buttons and zippers on men’s and women’s clothing has a long history rooted in tradition and practicality. Historically, wealthy European women wore complicated dresses that often req...

item.title: Kim Chiu and Paulo Avelino Share Genuine Moments Behind the Scenes of “The Alibi”
item.description: ABS-CBN’s latest article gives fans an exclusive glimpse into the camaraderie between Kim Chiu (KimPau) and Paulo Avelino (Thou) while filming their current TV series, “The Alibi.” The feature showcas...

item.title: Volvo Thailand faces civil action after EX30 battery fires amid recall delays
item.description: Volvo Cars is under pressure in Thailand following two new battery-related fires involving its EX30 electric SUV. The Thai consumer watchdog is considering civil action, seeking refunds plus interest ...

item.title: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith shuffles cabinet, appoints Jason Nixon as finance minister ahead of separation referendum
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith conducted a significant cabinet reshuffle on Thursday, reassigning approximately one-quarter of her front bench. Jason Nixon, a veteran minister, has been appointed as t...

item.title: Driver Hospitalized After Collision With Peel Police Cruiser in Brampton During Pursuit
item.description: In Brampton, Ontario, a vehicle fleeing Peel Regional Police was involved in a collision with a police cruiser, resulting in the driver being hospitalized. The incident occurred during an active polic...
